name: Dillybeans
recipeIngredient: 2 small onions, peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the green beans and snip off the ends. Discard any wilted or discolored beans.
2. In a saucepan combine water, vinegar, pickling salt, sugar, bay leaves, and onions. Bring to a boil and simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Drop the beans into the boiling liquid and cook for just 5 minutes until they are still crisp.
4. Drain immediately and rinse in cold water.
5. Pack the beans upright into 8-ounce jars with a couple of onion slices. Add 1 hot pepper, 1 clove garlic, and a sprig of dill to each jar.
6. Pour hot vinegar mixture over the beans to overflowing.
7. Seal the jars immediately.
Makes 8 eight ounce jars.
NOTE: Thinly cut carrots or other firm vegetables may be used in place of or in addition to the green beans.
